items.title: Connection definition
items.description: Configuration aspect of a Benchling Connect connection. A connection binds a specific instrument to a gateway and connection schema. The data/run aspects of connections are not modeled here.

Name.description: Connection name, typically the instrument name or model.

Benchling gateway.description: Name of the instrument gateway through which this instrument's files are transferred.

Benchling location.description: Benchling folder where instrument files will be stored and accessed.

Instrument type.description: Name of the connection schema that defines how this instrument's files are parsed. Available instrument types are determined by the type of gateway selected.

Default timezone.description: Timezone added to timestamps in instrument files that do not already include one. Use 'UTC' or an IANA region/zone string such as 'US/Eastern' or 'Europe/London'.

File extensions.description: List of file extensions to monitor, without a leading dot. Example values: csv, txt, pdf.

Output directory.description: Path to a local directory to monitor and retrieve files coming into Benchling, e.g. 'C:\path\to\directory'.

Input directory.description: Path to a local directory to send files from Benchling, e.g. 'C:\path\to\input\directory'.

Diagram.description: Properties solely used for diagram rendering.

API ID.description: API ID for the connection created during an export operation. This is ignored for import operations.
